source: KMP fake-transport reconnect-after-failure planning and shared ScriptedCommonFakeTransport prototype
description: Pins deterministic reconnect behavior after a disconnected operation so common runtime tests can model reconnect-before-retry without Android Bluedroid or iOS CoreBluetooth callbacks.

expected.commonDecision: Shared fake transport must make reconnect-after-failure explicit, observable, and deterministic before retry or reconnect-aware runtime planning delegates to KMP.

notes: This vector covers only the deterministic fake-transport reconnect control. Platform adapter reconnect semantics, backoff policy, and public facade error mapping remain feature-specific migration gates.
